meta.project: Diamond X Performance & Training Center PWA

product_overview: Diamond X is a mobile-first, role-based training management PWA for athletes, responsible users/business managers, and administrators. It lets users authenticate, manage training access, reserve eligible sessions, check in via QR code, track attendance, and handle plans and payments within a Supabase-backed app.
core_goals: Allow athletes to log in, register, and access their training dashboard.
Enable athletes with active plans to reserve eligible future training sessions.
Support QR code check-in and attendance tracking for training sessions.
Give responsible users and business managers read-only visibility into linked athletes.
Provide administrators with operational control over users, sessions, plans, attendance, and payments.
Restrict access and visible data according to user role.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Users can access the app by registering a new account or logging in with existing credentials.
user_flows: Navigate to /#register -> Fill in full name -> Fill in email -> Fill in CPF -> Fill in phone -> Select role -> Fill in password -> Submit registration form -> See account creation outcome
Navigate to /#login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See dashboard
Navigate to /#login -> Fill in invalid credentials -> Submit login form -> See error message

features.name: Athlete Dashboard
features.description: Athletes can view their current plan status, monthly attendance, next training session, and linked responsible user information.
user_flows: Log in -> Navigate to /#dashboard -> See active plan details -> See monthly attendance count -> See next training session details -> See linked responsible user information when available

features.name: Training Sessions and Reservations
features.description: Athletes can browse training sessions, reserve eligible future sessions, and cancel their own active reservations.
user_flows: Log in -> Navigate to /#trainings -> View the monthly training calendar -> Open an eligible future session -> Reserve the session -> See the reservation state update
Log in -> Navigate to /#trainings -> View a previously booked session -> Cancel the reservation -> See the reservation state update
Log in -> Navigate to /#trainings -> Open a session that is too close in time -> Attempt to reserve the session -> See that the session cannot be reserved
Log in -> Navigate to /#trainings -> Open a session with an existing booked reservation -> Attempt to reserve the session again -> See that the session cannot be reserved again

features.name: QR Code Check-In and Attendance
features.description: Athletes can check in to valid same-day sessions by scanning a QR code and review attendance history.
user_flows: Log in -> Navigate to /#attendance -> Start QR code check-in -> Scan a valid same-day session QR code -> See attendance recorded
Log in -> Navigate to /#attendance -> View attendance totals -> Review monthly attendance history -> See the attendance calendar and records

features.name: Plans and Services
features.description: Users can browse available plans and initiate a plan purchase for themselves or, where allowed, for linked athletes.
user_flows: Navigate to the plans and services area -> Browse active training and physiotherapy plans -> Review tier labels -> Start a plan purchase
Navigate to the plans and services area -> Select a plan for a linked athlete -> Start a purchase for the linked athlete

features.name: Responsible and Business Manager Visibility
features.description: Responsible users and business managers can view linked athletes and see their plan, reservation, and attendance information in read-only mode.
user_flows: Log in as a responsible user or business manager -> Navigate to the linked athletes area -> See linked athletes and their plan status -> Open a linked athlete record -> Review attendance and reservation details in read-only mode
Log in as a responsible user or business manager -> Navigate to the linked athletes area -> See an empty state when no athletes are linked

features.name: Profile Management
features.description: Users can view personal profile data and update profile-related information supported by the app.
user_flows: Log in -> Navigate to the profile area -> View name, email, CPF, and phone information -> Update profile data when allowed -> See the updated profile information
Log in -> Navigate to the profile area -> Upload or update an avatar image -> See the new avatar displayed

features.name: Admin Operations
features.description: Administrators can manage users, training sessions, plans, attendance, financial records, and reporting.
user_flows: Log in as an administrator -> Navigate to the admin dashboard -> Review student counts, active plans, revenue indicators, and today's sessions
Log in as an administrator -> Navigate to user management -> Create or edit a user -> Review the updated user information

Log in as an administrator -> Navigate to training management -> Create a training session -> See the session appear in the calendar -> Open the session details -> Review reservation counts and attendance information
Log in as an administrator -> Navigate to plans management -> Create or edit a plan -> Activate or deactivate the plan -> See the plan status update
Log in as an administrator -> Navigate to financial management -> Search or filter charges -> Confirm a payment or cancel a charge -> See the charge status update
Log in as an administrator -> Navigate to reports -> Review attendance and training performance metrics

routes.description: QR code check-in and attendance history

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials
